sections.heading: Customer Due Diligence
sections.text: Regulated entities must apply appropriate customer due diligence and risk-based monitoring for account opening and ongoing transactions.
clauses: Accounts with incomplete or simplified KYC should be subject to additional monitoring and review.
Unusual transaction patterns must be examined in line with the institution's risk management controls.

sections.heading: Suspicious Transaction Monitoring
sections.text: Banks should identify transactions involving unusual velocity, unexpected transaction value, adverse media, or patterns inconsistent with customer profile.
clauses: Previous suspicious reporting history should materially elevate the risk review threshold.
Linked accounts and repeated high-value fund flows require enhanced scrutiny.
